full_prompt: Design a monolithic AISI 1018 cold-rolled low-carbon steel gusset plate welded at the junction of the BAJA collegiate motorsport society 2026 Rev01 rulebook primary roll cage main hoop (25 mm OD x 3 mm wall 1018) and the front-upper side-tube, per BAJA collegiate motorsport society 2026 chassis section. The gusset is a single laser-cut and formed plate (monolithic; the weld to the tubes is not part of this CAD prompt; you are designing only the plate body). BAJA collegiate motorsport society 2026 inherits Baja USA primary roll cage mandatory tubing (25 mm OD x 3 mm wall for primary, 25.4 mm OD x 0.89 mm wall for secondary). Geometry: triangular gusset plate with base 120 mm (along main hoop tube) x perpendicular height 80 mm, thickness 5 mm, the longest edge (hypotenuse) 144 mm. Two integral 26 mm radius semi-circular coped edges along the two catetes that mate to the 25 mm OD tubes (so the plate saddles cleanly to the tubes for a continuous fillet weld). Three integral 10 mm diameter drain/inspection holes spaced along the interior of the triangle to reduce mass and allow weld-bead visual inspection. No bolts on the gusset itself (pure welded structure). Bounding envelope 120 x 80 x 5 mm. Material AISI 1018 CRS: E 205 GPa, nu 0.29, density 7870 kg/m^3, yield 370 MPa, UTS 440 MPa (cold-rolled); fatigue endurance 220 MPa at 10^7 cycles for polished, 154 MPa derated for weld HAZ per AWS D1.1 stress category C. Three load cases per Baja USA rulebook + BAJA collegiate motorsport society inheritance (Baja rollover survival + mBAJA 4WD drivetrain reaction). Load Case 1 (mandated rollover side-load): 1.5 kN applied perpendicular to the main hoop tube at the plate location per typical Baja chassis rollover structural demonstration (derived from 272 kg GVW * 5g rollover factor spread over the cage); the main-hoop tube endpoints constrained as pin + roller, the front side-tube endpoint constrained as pin. Load Case 2 (front impact): 4.5 kN along the front-upper side-tube axis, reacted into the gusset as shear and bending; this is a Baja rulebook front-impact design load (272 kg * 4.5g * partial = 12 kN total spread 1/3 to this gusset = 4 kN; rounded to 4.5 kN). Load Case 3 (mBAJA 4WD drive reaction): 2.0 kN axial pulling along the front-upper side-tube plus 500 N lateral from a differential-case reaction transmitted from mBAJA mandatory 4WD drivetrain. Pass/fail: (R1) under LC1 rollover side-load, peak von Mises in the gusset plate must not exceed 185 MPa (yield/2.0, Baja chassis safety allowable); (R2) under LC2 front impact, peak stress 247 MPa (yield/1.5 transient); (R3) under LC3 4WD drive reaction, peak stress 185 MPa; (R4) fatigue: 10^7 cycles of LC3 stress range 50% peak, local stress range at weld-coped edge HAZ must not exceed 154 MPa (weld HAZ derated endurance); (R5) gusset mass must not exceed 0.15 kg (per gusset; Baja chassis packages several gussets so mass budget is tight); (R6) no plate buckling under LC2 compressive flow: first-mode buckling load factor must be >= 2.5 under LC2. Thermal, fluid, vibration, and radiation analyses are not required. Deliver STEP AP242 geometry plus report.
short_prompt:
Design a monolithic AISI 1018 cold-rolled-steel gusset plate welded at the junction of the collegiate Baja 2026 primary roll-cage main hoop and front-upper side-tube (both 25 mm OD x 3 mm wall). The gusset is a single laser-cut triangular plate with two coped semicircular edges saddling the tubes for continuous fillet welding and three interior drain/inspection holes; no bolts on the gusset itself. Apply yield/2.0 (continuous) and yield/1.5 (transient) safety factors per the Baja chassis rulebook, using AWS D1.1 stress category C weld-HAZ endurance for fatigue.

Envelope: 120 x 80 x 5 mm triangular plate.

Load cases.
- LC1 rollover side load: 1.5 kN perpendicular to the main hoop at the plate (272 kg GVW * 5 g rollover factor spread over the cage), main-hoop endpoints pin/roller, side-tube end pinned.
- LC2 front impact: 4.5 kN along the front-upper side-tube axis reacted as shear and bending at the gusset.
- LC3 4WD drive reaction: 2.0 kN axial pull plus 500 N lateral from differential-case reaction through the side tube.
Also check a 10^7-cycle fatigue spectrum off LC3 at the weld-HAZ coped edge and a linear-buckling factor >= 2.5 under LC2 compressive flow.

prompt.title: BAJA collegiate motorsport society main-hoop to front-tube gusset plate
prompt.brief: 1018 CRS laser-cut gusset triangle 120x80x5, two coped tube saddles; Baja primary cage rollover + front impact + mBAJA 4WD.

rule_basis.baja_usa: primary 25 x 3 mm 1018, secondary 25.4 x 0.89 mm

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Frame-level NVH studied at full chassis; not at gusset.
